title: OldNewCombat
description: Makes a mix of the old and the new combat system (No crafting support yet)
body:
Makes a mix of the old and the new combat system (No crafting support yet)

Install by getting [forge 1.17.1](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/index_1.17.1.html)
Then put this file in the mods folder.

How damage is make

Swords are what I think they should be
Most axes are swords + 1 damage because they use more things to make them then swords.
They are more durable and faster then swords.
